overview: RunQuest Adventure is an immersive run-sharing app that turns your real GPS running routes into AI-powered interactive story adventures. Using your actual location and real street intersections detected via OpenStreetMap, Mistral AI narrates a genre-driven story out loud — Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Horror, Mystery, or Romance — as you run. At each intersection you make branching story choices, then save and share your completed adventure with the world.
features: Real-time GPS tracking with live Leaflet.js map and route trail
OpenStreetMap Nominatim intersection detection using real street names
AI story generation via Mistral (mistral-large-latest) with 500-word minimum chapters
Text-to-Speech narration via Mistral TTS (voxtral-mini-tts-2603) with audio-gated choice buttons
Five genre themes: Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Horror, Mystery, Romance
Branching narrative choices at every real-world intersection
Run saving with auto-generated story titles and shareable URLs
Public Adventure Feed showing all shared runs
Chapter-by-chapter story viewer for shared adventures
Internet Identity authentication for run saving
